creative_direction.reasoning: The concept is card-in-frame: the ad IS a Notion page floating on a yellow canvas with stacked paper depth. The card surface, window chrome, product UI screenshot strip, and the yellow frame must be generated (requires image-gen). But the headline, offer line, and two CTA buttons must be pixel-perfect with surgical word-coloring ($12,000 in blue, 'free' in red) — text compositing in post guarantees accuracy. Track B is the recommended path; Track A provided as a full-bake experiment.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Ad presents itself as a Notion page on a yellow desk — product UI screenshots become the proof layer.

prompt_track_A_full_bake.description: Single image-gen prompt producing the entire ad including all typography. Use only if verified text rendering is reliable on current Nano Banana 2 build.

nano_banana_json.scene: A stylized advertisement composition that looks like a Notion web page floating on a warm yellow canvas, photographed top-down as if laid on a desk, with subtle paper-depth from two offset card layers behind the primary card.

subject.description: A rounded-rectangle white card that mimics a browser window, occupying approximately 80% of the 1080x1080 canvas, centered, with generous margin on all sides of the yellow frame.
subject.card_details: Clean white fill (#FFFFFF), 24px corner radius, no drop shadow, one fine 1px light gray border. Two ghosted offset card silhouettes behind it (offset 12px down-left and 24px down-left, each 60% opacity gray-white) to imply a stack of pages.
subject.window_chrome: Top-left: Notion N logo (a geometric black-and-white letter N inside a slightly 3D paper-fold square icon, ~56px tall) next to the wordmark 'Notion' in black ExtraBold sans. Top-right: a blue pill button (#2D7FF9) with white text 'Get Started Free', ~44px tall, 20px horizontal padding.

environment.canvas_background: Flat warm yellow (#FFD63A) fills the 1080x1080 canvas; the white card sits on top.
background_elements: two ghosted stacked cards behind main card for depth

camera.framing: square 1:1, card centered, ~10% margin of yellow visible around card on all sides
camera.notes: This is a graphic composition, not a photograph — camera fields are vestigial. Treat as a flat vector render.

lighting.key_light: even diffused ambient, no directional key
lighting.shadows: zero drop shadows on any element; only a 1px card border carries edge definition

vertical_zones: Top 15%: logo left + Get Started Free CTA right (inside white card)
Center 30%: two-line headline 'Automate Your / Daily Tasks'
Center 10%: offer line 'Get up to $12,000 of free Notion'

style_directives: editorial SaaS aesthetic (Notion, Linear, Vercel design language)

text_elements_in_image.font: Notion's geometric ExtraBold sans (similar to Inter ExtraBold or Söhne Kraftig)
text_elements_in_image.position: inside white card, top-left, ~40px padding from card edges
inside white card, top-right, ~40px padding from card edges

text_elements_in_image.content: Get up to $12,000 of free Notion
Free 3 Month Trial, Full AI Access ✦

embedded_product_ui_strip.description: Bottom third of the card shows 3 stacked/overlapping Notion UI screenshots rendered as rounded-corner floating panels at slight overlap. Each shows a real Notion view.

panels.content_type: line chart dashboard 'Daily Report', 'Downloads by ...' label visible, multicolored stacked area chart
panels.style: white panel, 12px radius, 1px light border, no shadow

panels.content_type: Notion database table 'Engineering Tasks' with columns 'Projects', 'As Title', 7 rows of task rows with checkbox statuses

kanban/status view 'Launch checklist' with By status, Timeline, Kanban tabs and rows showing 'Write email announcement Done', 'Email content Done', 'Internal training with Sales In progress', 'Email images Backlog'

negative_prompt: no text outlines or text effects
no Arial or generic default system fonts
no blurred or smudged UI text

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Recommended path. Generate the yellow canvas + white card + ghosted stacked cards + product UI strip. Leave the vertical zones for headline, offer line, and AI Access pill as empty white space. Compositor overlays all text in post to guarantee typography accuracy and surgical word-coloring.

nano_banana_json.scene: Flat-lay graphic composition: a white rounded-rectangle card floating on a warm yellow canvas, with two ghosted offset card silhouettes behind it implying a stack. The card has a small Notion N logo and wordmark in the top-left and a blue 'Get Started Free' pill button in the top-right. Lower third of the card contains three overlapping Notion UI screenshot panels. The vertical middle 50% of the card is intentionally blank white space reserved for overlaid text.
nano_banana_json.subject: White rounded card, 80% of 1080x1080 canvas, centered, 24px corner radius, 1px #EEEEEE border, no drop shadow.
nano_banana_json.environment: Solid warm yellow (#FFD63A) background fills canvas. Two ghosted card silhouettes (60% opacity gray-white) offset 12px and 24px down-left behind the main card.

camera.framing: 1:1 square, 10% margin of yellow around card

lighting.style: flat graphic render, no directional light, no shadows

generate_elements: Notion N logo + wordmark, top-left of card, ~40px padding
Blue 'Get Started Free' pill button, top-right of card, ~40px padding
Three overlapping Notion UI screenshot panels in bottom 33% of card (line chart dashboard, database table, kanban status view)
Two ghosted stacked cards behind main card

style_directives: product UI panels must be legibly detailed (column headers readable, status pills visible) but not the focal element
no baked-in headline or body copy in reserved zones
negative_prompt: no headline text in reserved zones
no CTA pill text beyond Get Started Free in top-right

text_overlay_spec.description: Compositor applies these text elements over the generated Track B background.

elements.font_family: Inter / Söhne ExtraBold (substitute any geometric ExtraBold sans)

elements.content: Get up to $12,000 of free Notion
Free 3 Month Trial, Full AI Access ✦

brand_assets.description: Notion-owned assets referenced in the ad. Provide prompt language for image-gen attempts and a composite fallback path.

assets.name: Notion N logo
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: A geometric black-and-white letterform 'N' made of two thick vertical strokes connected by a diagonal, inside a rounded square icon with a very subtle paper-fold / 3D edge shadow on the right side. Icon is ~56px tall, solid fill, white on black or black on white depending on context.
assets.fallback_composite_source: brand-kit/notion-logo.svg (add to brand kit if missing)
assets.fidelity_confidence: medium — iterate if first pass is off

assets.name: Notion product UI screenshots (Daily Report chart, Engineering Tasks database, Launch checklist)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Three separate Notion-style UI panels: (1) a line/area chart dashboard with small gray header reading 'Daily Report' and subheader 'Downloads by ...', multiple stacked colored area bands in muted gray/blue/green tones; (2) a database table with header 'Engineering Tasks' and two columns 'Projects' and 'As Title', 7 rows each with a small checkbox status dot and task name text; (3) a kanban status view with tabs 'By status / Timeline / Kanban', showing 4 rows with status pills 'Done' (green), 'Done' (green), 'In progress' (blue), 'Backlog' (gray). All panels on white with 12px corner radius and 1px #EEEEEE border.
assets.fidelity_confidence: low — UI details are hard for image gen; composite fallback recommended

patterns_exemplified: CP-7 dual-CTA ladder (Get Started Free + Free 3 Month Trial)
DP-9 warm canvas for creator/IG targeting
prompt_writer_training_notes: Key lessons from this ad: (1) Card-in-frame archetype requires explicit window chrome description (logo placement, top-right CTA) — describe as structural, not decorative. (2) Surgical word-coloring is a post-composite move — always Track B when specific words need hex-accurate color. (3) Product UI panels should be described with legible header text + specific column/tab names so image-gen renders recognizable UI, not abstract rectangles. (4) Yellow canvas (#FFD63A) is a deliberate audience signal (creator/IG); don't substitute with a generic gradient. (5) Use 'flat graphic render' and set lens_mm/aperture to null when the composition is NOT photographic — this prevents image gen from introducing unwanted depth-of-field blur. (6) Every negative_prompt entry must match a specific anti-pattern; 'no stock photo feel' alone is too vague — add 'no drop shadows on text', 'no gradient mesh', etc. to establish structural boundaries.
